titleStmt.title: SII 25.131: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 131. (A.R. No. 131 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the second prākāra of the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The record furnishes the date viz., Regnal year 12, Mithuna, Monday which are insufficient for verification. However, it may be assigned to about the 12th century A.D. on palaeographical grounds.

It commences with the king-s praśasti, Tirumagaḷ-puṇarap-pugaḻmagaḷ-viḷaṅga, etc. It states that the mūlaparushai which met at the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍār at Tirupputtūr in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu gave an undertaking to Uyyavandāṉ Kaṇḍadēvaṉ alias Dēvar Kāṅgēyar for the endowments made in the śrīkōyil by the latter. It records the gift of dēvadāṉa lands, the enjoyments pertaining to the śivabrāhmaṇas and the vṛittis of the temple servants made as the capital (mudal) by him for the conduct of services and like the gōpura outside, Naralōkavīraṉ-tirumāḷigai in the centre, another gōpura, the tiruvaṇukkaṉ-tirumāḷigai and the tirumañjaṉamuṟṟu in the circumambulatory passage (uḷḷālai); for the coating to be made to the deity, for the food-offerings to be made on the day of the Tiruppūśam festival and for the burning of lamp to the deity Piḷḷaiyār (the image of which is kept inside), when it is taken out in procession; and for the food-offerings, lamp, coating to be made to the image Kshētrapāladēva on the day of Pūśam every month. A document was executed by the mūlaparushai to the effect that the daily services would be carried out from out of the gifts detailed above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ puṇarap pukaḻmakaḷ viḷaṅka vikkirama jeyamakaḷ poṟpuyat tiruppik kaṇakameruviṟ kayal viḷaiyāṭa Irunilattoru taṉi veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa tirumaṇi muṭitaṉ Urimaiyil cūṭi Ulaku potu niṅka Oruko
locci vañcimaṉṉarum vaṭapula ventaru mañcivantiṟaiñci Aṭimalar cūṭi maṉṉiya virasiṁhāsaṉattu Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya ko mutaṟ ko(ma)
mā(ṟu)vanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī parākrama pāṇṭiya devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2āvatu mituṉa nāyiṟṟu tiyati peṟṟa tiṅkaṭkiḻamai nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tirupputtūr tiruttaḷiyāṇṭār koyilile mulaparurṣaiyoṅkūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu
Uyyavantāṉ kaṇṭan=tavaṉāṉa devar kāṅkeyar śrī koyilil ceyta taṉmaṅkaḷ kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi . puṟampiṟ periya tirukkopuramum naṭuvil naralokaviraṉ tirumāḷiyai kopuramum Uḷḷiṟ tiruvaṉukkaṉ tirumāḷikaiyum Uḷḷālait tirumañcaṉa muṟṟun tirumeṟpūca
cukku nittam Oru tiramamāka muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatu tiramamum Uḷḷiṟ piḷḷaiyāṟkku nittamirunāḻi yavalamutum tiṅkaṭ tirunāḷ tiruppūrappaṭipuṟa(m) meḻuntaruḷiyamutu ceytaruḷa karuci Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum koyilaic cuḻala Eḻuntaruḷiyaruḷat tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikkut tiramam
Oṉṟum tiṅkaṭ tiruppūrattiṉ nāḷ kṣetrapāla devaṟku mañcavaṇṇamoṉṟukku Arici patakkaṟu nāḻiyum Eṇṇaikkāppu nāḻiyum neyyamutu nāḻiyum tirumeṟp pūccu Araiyum Aṭaikkāyamutuṭppaṭa vyañjanaṅkaḷukkut tiramam Araiyum Ācāriya dakṣiStops here.
Digital edition of SII 25.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
